user.title: Global Settings
user.description: Configure the main parameters for Power Control.

data.wait_before_start_min: Minutes below threshold before reconnecting loads

num_loads.title: Number of Loads
num_loads.description: How many loads do you want to configure? (1-20, in priority order: 1 = highest priority)

load.title: Configure load {load_number} of {total_loads}
load.description: Load 1 has the highest priority and will be the last one to be disconnected.

dashboard.title: Create Dashboard
dashboard.description: Do you want Power Control to automatically create a Lovelace dashboard? It will be accessible from the sidebar as 'Power Control'.

data_description.dashboard_user_controlled: If enabled, a button will appear to manually trigger dashboard regeneration instead of automatic updates.
data_description.dashboard_require_admin: If enabled, the sidebar dashboard will only be visible to Home Assistant administrators.

migrate.title: Previous configuration detected
migrate.description:
The old PowerControl package (pc.yaml) has been detected with {load_count} configured loads.

Would you like to automatically import the existing configuration?

migrate_confirm.title: Confirm import
migrate_confirm.description:
Imported configuration:

- **{load_count} loads**: {load_names}
- Immediate threshold: **{threshold_immediate} W**
- Delayed threshold: **{threshold_delayed} W**

Confirm the import? Choose 'No' to configure manually.

migrate_cleanup.title: Migration complete
migrate_cleanup.description:
The configuration has been imported successfully.

**Manual cleanup steps:**

1. **Old YAML package**: you can now safely delete `pc.yaml` (or the file containing the old Power Control package) from your `/config/packages/` folder.
2. **Old dashboard**: remove the old Lovelace dashboard manually from **Settings → Dashboards**.

The old package has been **disabled** automatically (`input_boolean.attiva_power_control` set to off) to prevent conflicts with the new integration.

restore_backup.title: Backup configuration found
restore_backup.description: A configuration backup from a previous installation was found, including loads, thresholds and timing. Would you like to restore it?

global.title: Global settings
global.description: Configure thresholds, timing and notifications for load shedding.

data_description.instance_name: A name to identify this Power Control instance.
data_description.global_power_sensor: Sensor measuring total power usage. If left empty, the sum of configured load sensors is used instead.
data_description.threshold_immediate: Power level above which loads are shed quickly (after the immediate delay).
data_description.threshold_delayed: Power level above which loads are shed slowly (after the delayed delay). Must be lower than the immediate threshold.
data_description.delay_immediate_sec: How long the immediate threshold must be exceeded before shedding a load.
data_description.delay_delayed_min: How long the delayed threshold must be exceeded before shedding a load.
data_description.wait_between_stops_sec: Pause between shedding one load and checking whether another must be shed.
data_description.wait_between_starts_min: Pause between restoring one load and the next.
data_description.wait_before_start_min: How long power must stay below the threshold before restoring any load.
data_description.notify_entity: Notification service used to alert you when loads are shed or restored.

error.threshold_order: The immediate threshold must be higher than the delayed threshold.

restore_confirm.title: Review restored configuration
restore_confirm.description:
{load_count} loads will be restored: {load_names}.
Thresholds: immediate {threshold_immediate} W, delayed {threshold_delayed} W.

Confirm to apply this configuration, or decline to start a fresh setup instead.

error.threshold_order: The immediate threshold must be higher than the delayed threshold.

data.wait_before_start_min: Minutes below threshold before reconnecting loads

error.threshold_order: The immediate threshold must be greater than the delayed threshold.
